description: Meta-Harness diagnostic scenarios for the Python Agent memory lifecycle. These scenarios focus on Hindsight/MemPalace/Fusion evidence and route metadata; threshold-specific pre_save/compaction behavior is unit-tested with model-window overrides.

turns.user: Use memory_add now to remember this exact lifecycle probe: memory_lifecycle_probe_prefers_verbatim_evidence_before_compaction.
Use memory_search now to recall memory_lifecycle_probe_prefers_verbatim_evidence_before_compaction and tell me the exact phrase you found.

metadata.focus: explicit memory tool path plus Fusion route visibility

turns.user: Remember this project memory: before any context compaction, exact tool outputs and decisions should be archived as verbatim evidence.
What should happen before context compaction if exact tool outputs are still only in the chat?

metadata.focus: automatic recall/retain and Fusion route visibility

turns.user: Remember this project preference: for correction probes, the current preferred evidence mode is summary-only.
Correction: for correction probes, the current preferred evidence mode is verbatim-first with source refs. Remember the correction.
What is my current preferred evidence mode for correction probes?

metadata.focus: correction should update stale memory and preserve source-backed evidence

turns.user: What should happen before context compaction if exact tool outputs are still only in the chat? Do not store anything new.

metadata.focus: compaction policy explanation must not trigger an unnecessary memory write

turns.user: Remember this derived preference: when comparing swing trades, summarize my preference as capital preservation before upside capture.
Update that preference: for swing trades, summarize my preference as capital preservation, then liquidity, then upside capture.
What is my summarized swing-trade preference now?

metadata.focus: Hindsight summarized preference recall/update without requiring verbatim MemPalace evidence

turns.user: Remember the exact episodic note: mempalace_episode_alpha exact drawer text: review copper only after London close.
Recall the exact mempalace_episode_alpha drawer text with its source/session reference.

required_response_terms: review copper only after London close
required_memory_evidence_terms: review copper only after London close

metadata.focus: MemPalace verbatim/episodic recall with loci and source/session refs

turns.user: Remember this summary preference: I prefer risk reviews to start with exposure concentration.
Remember this exact evidence note: fusion_episode_beta source says hedge first when two positions share the same macro driver.
Use both my summarized preference and exact evidence note to explain how to start a risk review.

metadata.focus: Fusion combines Hindsight summary evidence with MemPalace verbatim evidence

turns.user: Remember this summarized risk rule: stale summary says I accept 3 correlated crypto positions.
Remember this exact correction: current source-backed rule says I accept at most 1 correlated crypto position.
What is my current correlated crypto position rule?

metadata.focus: Fresh/source-backed MemPalace verbatim evidence constrains stale Hindsight summary
